title: Soulection Radio Show #418 w/Complexion
content:
UK DJ Complexion chats with Joe and drops an exclusive mix.

<!--more-->

👉 Watch the [interview on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4TSD4W7nonM) 👈

Complexion hosts The Future Beats Show
Sundays from 2pm LA • 5pm NYC • 10pm LDN
[WestSide 89.6FM](http://www.thisiswestside.com/index.php)

Follow Complexion on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/complexion), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/2iseeajqZcdN9usOkZA3vX?si=aazdCsQ_RjOJcrD4gJYvAA) [MixCloud](https://www.mixcloud.com/DjComplexion/), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/complexion/), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/complexion), and [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/DJCOMPLEXION/)
